title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.713 - Penalty for signing false documents
text:
351.713.  Penalty for signing false documents. — 1.  A person commits an offense if he signs a document provided for in this chapter which he knows is false in any material respect with intent that the document be delivered to the secretary of state for filing.
  2.  A violation of this section is a class A misdemeanor.
(L. 1990 H.B. 1432)
